calendar.matters:
Mo To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.

DEFENDANT ANTHONY ATONDO, MARIE ATONDO'S Motion To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED IF DEFENDANT BRINGS PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE TO COURT AT HEARING. OTHERWISE, DENIED. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, THE MOTION IS DENIED CONSISTANT WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
